risk_factors.name: Honeypot Detection
risk_factors.description: Token may be a honeypot (can buy but cannot sell)

risk_factors.name: Mintable Token
risk_factors.description: Owner can mint new tokens, potentially diluting value

risk_factors.name: Blacklist Function
risk_factors.description: Owner can blacklist addresses from trading

risk_factors.name: Unlocked Liquidity
risk_factors.description: Liquidity pool is not locked, rug pull risk

risk_factors.name: Unverified Contract
risk_factors.description: Contract source code is not verified

risk_assessment.recommendation: Token appears to be safe. Standard due diligence recommended.
